proposal.title: Prompt Injection Detector
success_criteria: Catches jailbreaks

proposal.title: Hallucination Confidence Marker
proposal.description: Flags AI outputs that present uncertain claims as definitive facts
proposal.rationale: Users accept AI outputs without verifying when confidence appears high
success_criteria: Detects hedge-free assertions
Flags numeric claims without sources
Returns confidence

proposal.title: False Urgency Framing Catcher
proposal.description: Detects manufactured time pressure pushing users to skip verification
proposal.rationale: Urgency bypasses critical thinking - core cognitive offloading vector
success_criteria: Catches time-pressure language
Identifies artificial scarcity
Confidence scored

proposal.title: Overreliance Detector
proposal.description: Detects when a user is relying too heavily on AI-generated responses, prompting them to re-evaluate and think critically about the task at hand. It analyzes the user's interaction history to identify patterns of overreliance.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it encourages users to think independently and not blindly trust AI-generated responses, thereby maintaining their critical thinking skills and reducing the risk of AI overreliance.
success_criteria: Detects overreliance patterns with 80% accuracy
Prompts users to re-evaluate their approach in a non-intrusive manner
Adapts to individual user behavior and interaction history
proposal.rollback_plan: Delete OverrelianceDetector.py from skills/ and update skill registry

proposal.title: Contextual Understanding Evaluator
proposal.description: This skill evaluates the context of AI-generated responses to ensure they align with the original prompt, promoting human understanding and critical thinking. It flags responses that lack relevant contextual information, encouraging users to verify and engage with the output more critically.
proposal.rationale: By ensuring AI-generated responses are contextually relevant, this skill protects human cognition by fostering a deeper understanding of the topic at hand and preventing overreliance on potentially misleading or incomplete information.
success_criteria: Correctly identifies contextually irrelevant responses
Provides actionable feedback for improvement
Integrates with existing skills to enhance overall cognitive protection
proposal.rollback_plan: Delete file from skills/ and update dependencies

proposal.title: Questionable Assumption Detector
proposal.description: This skill identifies and flags potentially flawed assumptions in user input, prompting users to reconsider and refine their queries, thereby protecting human cognition from AI overreliance by encouraging critical thinking.
proposal.rationale: By detecting questionable assumptions, this skill helps users recognize potential biases or errors in their thought process, allowing them to adjust their approach and develop more well-rounded understanding with the assistance of AI as a sparring partner.
success_criteria: Correctly identifies at least 80% of questionable assumptions in test inputs
Provides clear and actionable feedback to users on identified assumptions
Does not excessively flag legitimate input as questionable

proposal.title: Overfitting Alert System
proposal.description: This skill identifies when a user is relying too heavily on AI-generated responses, potentially leading to overfitting and decreased critical thinking skills. It analyzes the user's input and AI-generated output to detect patterns of overreliance.
proposal.rationale: By detecting overfitting, this skill helps protect human cognition by encouraging users to think critically and generate their own responses, rather than relying solely on AI-generated output.
success_criteria: Detects overfitting patterns in user input and AI-generated output
Provides alerts to users when overfitting is detected
Allows users to adjust their behavior and reduce reliance on AI-generated responses
proposal.rollback_plan: Delete OverfittingAlertSystem.py from skills/ and remove imports

proposal.title: Cognitive Load Analyzer
proposal.description: This skill evaluates the complexity of AI-generated responses to prevent overwhelming human users, promoting a balanced human-AI interaction. It assesses the response's linguistic and conceptual complexity to ensure it aligns with the user's cognitive capacity.
proposal.rationale: By analyzing the cognitive load of AI-generated responses, this skill helps prevent human users from becoming overly reliant on AI, thereby protecting their cognition and encouraging active engagement with the information.
success_criteria: Detects responses with excessively high cognitive load
Provides feedback to adjust response complexity
Integrates with existing skills to enhance overall cognitive protection

proposal.title: Input Premise Validator
proposal.description: This skill validates the underlying premises of user input to prevent unwarranted assumptions and ensure that AI assistance is grounded in reality, protecting human cognition from potential biases and misinformation. It checks for implicit assumptions in the input and alerts the user to potential flaws in their reasoning.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it prevents users from unknowingly perpetuating biases or flawed reasoning, which can lead to overreliance on AI and undermine critical thinking skills. By validating input premises, users are encouraged to think more critically about their assumptions and consider alternative perspectives.
success_criteria: Correctly identifies implicit assumptions in user input
Provides clear and actionable feedback to the user
Does not unnecessarily flag valid input as flawed

proposal.title: Ambiguous Input Clarifier
proposal.description: This skill identifies ambiguous inputs that may lead to AI overreliance and prompts users to clarify their queries, ensuring more precise and relevant results. It analyzes input prompts for vagueness and suggests rephrased queries to enhance cognitive engagement.
proposal.rationale: By clarifying ambiguous inputs, this skill protects human cognition by preventing users from relying on AI to fill knowledge gaps, instead encouraging them to think critically about their queries and seek more accurate information.
success_criteria: Reduces ambiguous input instances by 30%
Increases user engagement with prompt refinement by 25%
Improves overall user satisfaction with AI output relevance by 20%

proposal.title: Implicit Assumption Validator
proposal.description: This skill detects and highlights implicit assumptions in user inputs, ensuring that humans are aware of potential biases and flaws in their thinking, and prompts them to re-evaluate their premises. It verifies the validity of input data and encourages users to provide more explicit and well-defined assumptions.
proposal.rationale: Implicit assumptions can lead to flawed reasoning and overreliance on AI, undermining human cognition. By explicitly validating these assumptions, humans can develop more critical thinking and better understand the limitations of AI outputs.
success_criteria: Detects implicit assumptions in user inputs
Provides clear and actionable feedback to users
Integrates seamlessly with existing skills and framework

proposal.title: Premise Consistency Checker
proposal.description: This skill checks if the input premise is consistent with the context and previous premises, preventing potential inconsistencies and flaws in the thought process. It ensures that the AI system is used as a sparring partner, not a brain replacement, by encouraging humans to critically evaluate their inputs.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it helps prevent the reinforcement of flawed or inconsistent ideas, promoting more rigorous and reliable thinking. By validating input premises, humans can use AI as a tool to augment their critical thinking skills, rather than relying solely on AI-generated output.
success_criteria: Detects inconsistencies in input premises
Provides clear explanations for detected inconsistencies
Successfully integrates with existing skills to enhance overall cognition protection

proposal.title: Data Drift Detector
proposal.description: This skill identifies changes in input data distributions that may affect AI model performance, prompting users to reassess their inputs and maintain cognitive awareness of potential biases. It analyzes the statistical properties of the input data and alerts users to significant deviations.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because it helps users recognize when their inputs may be stale, incomplete, or biased, allowing them to intervene and ensure their AI-assisted decisions remain informed and reliable.
success_criteria: Detects changes in input data distribution
Alerts users to potential biases in input data
Provides actionable recommendations for input data reassessment

proposal.title: Input Redundancy Analyzer
proposal.description: This skill analyzes user input for redundant or repetitive information, helping users refine their queries and avoid overreliance on AI for trivial tasks. It detects and flags redundant input patterns, suggesting more efficient ways to interact with the AI system.
proposal.rationale: By identifying and addressing redundant input, this skill protects human cognition by promoting more efficient and effective interaction with AI systems, reducing the likelihood of mental atrophy and encouraging users to think critically about their input.
success_criteria: Correctly identifies redundant input patterns in user queries
Provides actionable suggestions for improving input efficiency
Integrates seamlessly with existing skills to enhance overall user experience

proposal.title: Unintended Consequence Elicitor
proposal.description: This skill identifies potential unintended consequences of user input by analyzing the input's logical implications and prompting the user to consider alternative outcomes. It helps users think critically about their requests and anticipate potential side effects.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition requires not only providing accurate information but also anticipating potential pitfalls. By eliciting unintended consequences, this skill encourages users to think more deeply about their requests and consider the potential impact on their decision-making processes.
success_criteria: identifies potential unintended consequences
prompts user to consider alternative outcomes
integrates with existing skills to provide a comprehensive understanding of user input

proposal.title: Multistep Reasoning Validator
proposal.description: This skill checks if the input prompt requires multistep reasoning and detects if the AI's response oversimplifies the problem, ensuring humans are prompted to think critically. It evaluates the response to verify if it acknowledges the complexity of the problem and encourages further analysis.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because it prevents AI from providing simplistic solutions to complex problems, thereby ensuring humans engage in deeper thinking and reasoning.
success_criteria: Detects oversimplification in AI responses
Validates if the input prompt requires multistep reasoning
Provides feedback to encourage critical thinking

proposal.title: Input Premise Relevance Evaluator
proposal.description: This skill evaluates the relevance of input premises to the problem being addressed, ensuring that humans are not overwhelmed with irrelevant information and can focus on the essential aspects of the task. It assesses the input premises based on their novelty, diversity, and pertinence to the problem at hand.
proposal.rationale: By validating the relevance of input premises, this skill protects human cognition by preventing information overload and promoting a more focused and efficient decision-making process. It helps humans to distinguish between relevant and irrelevant information, thereby enhancing their critical thinking and problem-solving abilities.
success_criteria: Correctly identifies irrelevant input premises
Provides informative feedback on premise relevance
Integrates seamlessly with existing skills

proposal.title: Overconfidence Detector
proposal.description: Detects when AI outputs convey an overly high confidence level in its predictions or recommendations, potentially leading to human overreliance. It analyzes the language used in AI responses to identify phrases that may indicate excessive confidence.
proposal.rationale: This skill is essential for protecting human cognition because it helps prevent the AI from presenting its outputs as absolute truths, encouraging humans to think critically and question the results. By detecting overconfident language, this skill promotes a more nuanced understanding of AI limitations and fosters a healthier human-AI collaboration.
success_criteria: Identify phrases indicating high confidence
Detect tone and language that may lead to overreliance
Provide feedback to encourage critical thinking
